stemHtml: What is the required lateral separation between two aeroplanes which are both using the same navigational aid?

options.a: Different courses of more than 15° and 10 NM of lateral distance.
options.b: Lateral angle/distance according to the navigational aid in use.
options.c: Different courses of more than 25° and 15 NM of lateral distance.
options.d: Different courses of 45° and 10 NM of lateral distance.
